title: Laplacian
summary: Introduces the normal-form defining function Q = 2 rho t^2 and an interface for the ambient Laplacian in these coordinates.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Introduces the normal-form defining function Q = 2 rho t^2 and an interface for the ambient Laplacian in these coordinates.

mathematicalContent.heading: How to read the translation
mathematicalContent.body: The correspondence below follows Ambient/FG/Laplacian.lean declaration by declaration. A definition is translated by its defining expression, a theorem by its quantified proposition, and a structure, class, or inductive type by the mathematical data encoded in its fields or constructors. The original Lean signature remains visible beside every translation.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Convert the positive scale coordinate to a real number. In explicit terms, for a of type pos real, its defining expression is a.val.

The chosen-scale t coordinate on the ambient bundle. In explicit terms, for s of type conf.scale, and u of type conf.ambient bundle, its defining expression is pos Real To Real Conf.trivialization s U.1.1.
correspondence.leanType: noncomputable def scaleT (s : Conf.Scale) (U : Conf.AmbientBundle) : ℝ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The normal-form defining function Q = |T|^2 = 2 rho t^2. In explicit terms, for a of type normal ambient data conf, its defining expression is the function sending U to 2 times Conf.rho Coord U times scale T A.base Scale U to the power 2.
correspondence.leanType: noncomputable def normalQ (A : NormalAmbientData Conf) : Operators.Function Conf

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For A of type Normal Ambient Data Conf, and U of type Conf.Ambient Bundle, normal Q A U equals 2 times Conf.rho Coord U times scale T A.base Scale U to the power 2.
correspondence.leanType: theorem normalQ_apply (A : NormalAmbientData Conf) (U : Conf.AmbientBundle) : normalQ A U = 2 * Conf.rhoCoord U * (scaleT A.baseScale U) ^ 2

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Multiplication by the normal-form defining function Q. In explicit terms, for a of type normal ambient data conf, and f of type operators.function conf, its defining expression is the function sending U to normal Q A U times f U.
correspondence.leanType: def normalQmul (A : NormalAmbientData Conf) (f : Operators.Function Conf) : Operators.Function Conf

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Multiplication by Q^m in normal form. In explicit terms, for a of type normal ambient data conf, m in the natural numbers, and f of type operators.function conf, its defining expression is the function sending U to normal Q A U to the power m times f U.
correspondence.leanType: def normalQpowMul (A : NormalAmbientData Conf) (m : ℕ) (f : Operators.Function Conf) : Operators.Function Conf

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: A certified normal-form model for the dilation operator and ambient Laplacian. The fields are deliberately the same identities expected by the existing ambient calculus layer, but with Q fixed to the Fefferman-Graham normal-form function 2 rho t^2. Its mathematical data are: base Dim: the real numbers; X: Operators.Function Conf maps to Operators.Function Conf; laplacian: Operators.Function Conf maps to Operators.Function Conf; X Q: X normal Q A equals the function sending U to 2 times normal Q A U; lap smul: for every c f : Operators.Function Conf, ambient Laplacian the function sending U to c times f U equals the function sending U to c times ambient Laplacian f U; lap add: for every f g : Operators.Function Conf, ambient Laplacian the function sending U to f U plus g U equals the function sending U to ambient Laplacian f U plus ambient Laplacian g U; X lap comm: for every f : Operators.Function Conf, X ambient Laplacian f equals the function sending U to ambient Laplacian X f U minus 2 times ambient Laplacian f U; lap Q comm: for every f : Operators.Function Conf, ambient Laplacian normal Qmul A f equals the function sending U to normal Q A U times ambient Laplacian f U plus 2 times 2 times X f U plus base Dim plus 2 times f U; lap Qpow of XHomogeneous: for every m w : the real numbers f : Operators.Function Conf, X f equals the function sending U to w times f U maps to ambient Laplacian normal Qpow Mul A m f equals the function sending U to normal Q A U to the power m times ambient Laplacian f U plus 2 times m times 2 times w plus base Dim plus 2 times m times normal Q A U to the power m minus 1 times f U.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \begin{aligned}\operatorname{baseDim}&\colon \mathbb{R}\\X&\colon \operatorname{Operators}.\operatorname{Function} \operatorname{Conf} \longrightarrow \operatorname{Operators}.\operatorname{Function} \operatorname{Conf}\\\widetilde{\Delta}&\colon \operatorname{Operators}.\operatorname{Function} \operatorname{Conf} \longrightarrow \operatorname{Operators}.\operatorname{Function} \operatorname{Conf}\\\operatorname{X\_Q}&\colon X (\operatorname{normalQ} A) = U \longmapsto 2 \cdot \operatorname{normalQ} A U\\\operatorname{lap\_smul}&\colon \forall c (f \colon \operatorname{Operators}.\operatorname{Function} \operatorname{Conf}), \widetilde{\Delta} (U \longmapsto c \cdot f U) = U \longmapsto c \cdot \widetilde{\Delta} f U\\\operatorname{lap\_add}&\colon \forall f g \colon \operatorname{Operators}.\operatorname{Function} \operatorname{Conf}, \widetilde{\Delta} (U \longmapsto f U + g U) = U \longmapsto \widetilde{\Delta} f U + \widetilde{\Delta} g U\\\operatorname{X\_lap\_comm}&\colon \forall f \colon \operatorname{Operators}.\operatorname{Function} \operatorname{Conf}, X (\widetilde{\Delta} f) = U \longmapsto \widetilde{\Delta} (X f) U - 2 \cdot \widetilde{\Delta} f U\\\operatorname{lap\_Q\_comm}&\colon \forall f \colon \operatorname{Operators}.\operatorname{Function} \operatorname{Conf}, \widetilde{\Delta} (\operatorname{normalQmul} A f) = U \longmapsto \operatorname{normalQ} A U \cdot \widetilde{\Delta} f U + 2 \cdot (2 \cdot X f U + (\operatorname{baseDim} + 2) \cdot f U)\\\operatorname{lap\_Qpow\_of\_XHomogeneous}&\colon \forall m {w \colon \mathbb{R}} {f \colon \operatorname{Operators}.\operatorname{Function} \operatorname{Conf}}, X f = (U \longmapsto w \cdot f U) \longrightarrow \widetilde{\Delta} (\operatorname{normalQpowMul} A m f) = U \longmapsto \operatorname{normalQ} A U ^ m \cdot \widetilde{\Delta} f U + 2 \cdot m \cdot (2 \cdot w + \operatorname{baseDim} + 2 \cdot m ) \cdot \operatorname{normalQ} A U ^ (m - 1) \cdot f U\end{aligned}

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The normal-form expression for Q. In symbols, the proposition is the statement displayed below.
correspondence.leanType: theorem straightForm_Q_eq (A : NormalAmbientData Conf) : normalQ A = fun U => 2 * Conf.rhoCoord U * (scaleT A.baseScale U) ^ 2

references.locator: Chapters 2–3, ambient space and normal form
references.note: Geometric source for the ambient bundle, homogeneity, normal form, and commutator calculations.

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
